name: youtube-channels-manager
description: Organize your youtube channels into groups and lists. Access them from Crunchyroll and Youtube the sidebar
author: arthurbugan

scripts.build:chrome: plasmo build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/chrome-mv3-prod/manifest.json'));delete m.action.default_popup;m.name='Groupify Youtube Organize';m.version='1.4.0';fs.writeFileSync('build/chrome-mv3-prod/manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2))"
scripts.build:firefox: plasmo build --target=firefox-mv2 && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/firefox-mv2-prod/manifest.json'));m.sidebar_action={default_panel:'sidepanel.html'};m.browser_action.default_title='Groupify Youtube Organize';delete m.browser_action.default_popup;m.name='Groupify Youtube Organize';m.version='1.4.0';fs.writeFileSync('build/firefox-mv2-prod/manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2))"
scripts.build:ios: plasmo build --target=safari-mv3 && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('build/safari-mv3-prod/manifest.json'));delete m.side_panel;m.action.default_popup='popup.html';m.name='Groupify YT Organize';m.version='1.4.0';fs.writeFileSync('build/safari-mv3-prod/manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2));fs.copyFileSync('build/safari-mv3-prod/sidepanel.html','build/safari-mv3-prod/popup.html')" && node scripts/update-xcode.js
